seoTitle: Dolphin Sands vs Douglas River — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Dolphin Sands and Douglas River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Dolphin Sands vs Douglas River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Dolphin Sands and Douglas River.
heading: Dolphin Sands vs Douglas River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dolphin Sands, Tasmania and Douglas River, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Douglas River has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Dolphin Sands (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dolphin Sands or Douglas River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dolphin Sands has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Douglas River scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dolphin Sands scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Douglas River scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dolphin Sands or Douglas River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Douglas River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
